subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in the grace and bounty of God! Praise be unto Him that thou art occupied with penning pages in service to the friends of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مطمئن بفضل و عنایت حق الحمد لله در خدمت احبای خدا بتحریر اوراق مشغولی و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
